faqs.question: What determines the cost of termite treatment in Richmond?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment costs in Richmond ($800-$4,000) depend on your home's size, infestation severity, foundation type, and treatment method selected. Larger Victorian or colonial homes common in Richmond may require more extensive treatment, while smaller properties typically fall on the lower end of the range. We provide free inspections to give you an accurate quote.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Richmond, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Richmond primarily deals with Eastern subterranean termites, which thrive in the area's soil and wooded environments. These termites build colonies underground and access homes through foundation cracks or wood-to-soil contact. Our treatments target both the colony and entry points to eliminate current infestations and prevent future ones.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Richmond homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Richmond are completed within 4-8 hours depending on your property size and chosen method. Liquid barrier treatments around foundations can be done in one day, while baiting systems require initial installation plus follow-up visits. We work efficiently to minimize disruption while ensuring thorough protection of your home.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite prevention services in Richmond?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive termite prevention services including soil treatments, moisture control recommendations, and regular monitoring programs. Given Richmond's wooded environment and older housing stock, preventive measures are highly recommended. Annual inspections help catch termite activity early, potentially saving thousands in repair costs.
